016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.IoUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.util.*;
025import java.util.function.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
032
033/**
034 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link YamlSerializer}.
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
037 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
038 * </ul>
039 *
040 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
041 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/YamlBasics">YAML Basics</a>
042 * </ul>
043 */
044@SuppressWarnings({
045   "resource",  // Resource management handled externally
046   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
047   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
048   "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for YAML serializer session methods
049})
050public class YamlSerializerSession extends WriterSerializerSession implements RecordWritable, ArrayRecordWritable {
051
052   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
053   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
054
055   /**
056    * Builder class.
057    */
058   public static class Builder extends WriterSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
059
060      /**
061       * Constructor
062       *
063       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
064       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
065       */
066      protected Builder(YamlSerializer ctx) {
067         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
068      }
069
070      @Override
071      public YamlSerializerSession build() {
072         return new YamlSerializerSession(this);
073      }
074
075   }
076
077   /**
078    * Creates a new builder for this object.
079    *
080    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
081    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
082    * @return A new builder.
083    */
084   public static Builder create(YamlSerializer ctx) {
085      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
086   }
087
088   /**
089    * Constructor.
090    *
091    * @param builder The builder for this object.
092    */
093   protected YamlSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
094      super(builder);
095   }
096
097   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
098   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
099      serializeAnything(getYamlWriter(out), o, getExpectedRootType(o), "root", null, true);
100   }
101
102   /**
103    * Opens a whole-value push generator targeting YAML output, bound to this live session.
104    * {@link RecordWriter#write(Object) write(Object)} delegates to
105    * {@link SerializerSession#serialize(Object, Object)}.
106    *
107    * @param output The output.
108    * @return A new {@link RecordWriter}.
109    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
110    */
111   @Override /* RecordWritable */
112   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
113      return RecordAdapter.writer(this, output);
114   }
115
116   /**
117    * Buffered array-element {@link RecordWriter} for YAML, bound to this live session.  Buffers
118    * each {@code write(...)} and emits the whole list on {@code close()}.
119    *
120    * @param output The output.
121    * @return A new {@link RecordWriter}.
122    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
123    */
124   @Override /* ArrayRecordWritable */
125   public RecordWriter serializeArrayRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
126      return RecordAdapter.arrayWriter(this, output);
127   }
128
129   /**
130    * The YAML record writer is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
131    *
132    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
133    */
134   @Override /* RecordWritable */
135   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
136
137   /**
138    * The YAML array-record writer is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
139    *
140    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
141    */
142   @Override /* ArrayRecordWritable */
143   public boolean isArrayRecordStreaming() { return false; }
144
145   /**
146    * Converts the specified output target object to a {@link YamlWriter}.
147    *
148    * @param out The output target object.
149    * @return The output target object wrapped in a {@link YamlWriter}.
150    */
151   protected final YamlWriter getYamlWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
152      var output = out.getRawOutput();
153      if (output instanceof YamlWriter output2)
154         return output2;
155      var w = new YamlWriter(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), isTrimStrings(), getUriResolver());
156      out.setWriter(w);
157      return w;
158   }
159
160   /**
161    * Workhorse method.
162    * Determines the type of object, and then calls the appropriate type-specific serialization method.
163    *
164    * @param out The output writer.
165    * @param o The object to serialize.
166    * @param eType The expected type.
167    * @param attrName The attribute name.
168    * @param pMeta The bean property currently being parsed.
169    * @param asField If <jk>true</jk>, this value appears inline after a key or at root level.
170    *    If <jk>false</jk>, this value needs its own indentation as a standalone block.
171    * @return The same writer passed in.
172    * @throws SerializeException General serialization error occurred.
173    */
174   @SuppressWarnings({
175      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
176      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
177   })
178   protected YamlWriter serializeAnything(YamlWriter out, Object o, ClassMeta<?> eType, String attrName, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta, boolean asField) throws SerializeException {
179
180      if (o == null) {
181         out.append("null");
182         return out;
183      }
184
185      if (eType == null)
186         eType = object();
187
188      ClassMeta<?> aType;
189      ClassMeta<?> sType;
190
191      aType = push2(attrName, o, eType);
192      boolean isRecursion = aType == null;
193
194      if (aType == null) {
195         o = null;
196         aType = object();
197      }
198
199      if (isOptional(aType)) {
200         o = getOptionalValue(o);
201         eType = getOptionalType(eType);
202         aType = getClassMetaForObject(o, object());
203      }
204
205      sType = aType;
206      String typeName = getBeanTypeName(this, eType, aType, pMeta);
207
208      var swap = aType.getSwap(this);
209      if (nn(swap)) {
210         o = swap(swap, o);
211         sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
212
213         if (sType.isObject())
214            sType = getClassMetaForObject(o);
215      }
216
217      if (o == null || (sType.isChar() && ((Character)o).charValue() == 0)) {
218         out.append("null");
219      } else if (sType.isBean()) {
220         serializeBeanMap(out, toBeanMap(o), typeName);
221      } else if (sType.isMap()) {
222         if (o instanceof BeanMap o2)
223            serializeBeanMap(out, o2, typeName);
224         else
225            serializeMap(out, (Map)o, eType);
226      } else if (sType.isCollection()) {
227         serializeCollection(out, (Collection)o, eType, asField);
228      } else if (sType.isArray()) {
229         serializeCollection(out, toList(sType.inner(), o), eType, asField);
230      } else if (sType.isNumber() || sType.isBoolean()) {
231         out.append(o);
232      } else if (sType.isUri() || (nn(pMeta) && pMeta.isUri())) {
233         out.uriValue(o);
234      } else if (sType.isReader()) {
235         pipe((Reader)o, out, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
236      } else if (sType.isInputStream()) {
237         pipe((InputStream)o, out, SerializerSession::handleThrown);
238      } else {
239         out.textValue(toString(o));
240      }
241
242      if (! isRecursion)
243         pop();
244      return out;
245   }
246
247   /**
248    * Determines whether a ClassMeta represents a complex type that requires block-style YAML formatting.
249    */
250   private boolean isComplexValue(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
251      if (cm == null)
252         return false;
253      if (cm.isMapOrBean() || cm.isCollectionOrArrayOrOptional())
254         return true;
255      var swap = cm.getSwap(this);
256      if (swap != null) {
257         var swapType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
258         return swapType.isMapOrBean() || swapType.isCollectionOrArrayOrOptional();
259      }
260      return false;
261   }
262
263   private SerializerWriter serializeBeanMap(YamlWriter out, BeanMap<?> m, String typeName) throws SerializeException {
264      int i = indent - 1;
265
266      var addAtt = Flag.create();
267      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
268
269      if (nn(typeName)) {
270         BeanPropertyMeta pm = m.getMeta().getTypeProperty();
271         out.key(pm.getName()).textValue(typeName);
272         addAtt.set();
273      }
274
275      m.forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, value, thrown) -> {
276         var cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
277         if (nn(thrown))
278            onBeanGetterException(pMeta, thrown);
279
280         if (canIgnoreValue(pMeta, key, value))
281            return;
282
283         addAtt.ifSet(() -> out.yamlIndent(i)).set();
284
285         ClassMeta<?> actualType = value == null ? cMeta : getClassMetaForObject(value, cMeta);
286         if (value != null && isComplexValue(actualType)) {
287            out.keyName(key).w(": ");
288            if (actualType.isCollectionOrArrayOrOptional()) {
289               serializeAnything(out, value, cMeta, key, pMeta, false);
290            } else {
291               out.yamlIndent(i + 1);
292               serializeAnything(out, value, cMeta, key, pMeta, true);
293            }
294         } else {
295            out.key(key);
296            serializeAnything(out, value, cMeta, key, pMeta, true);
297         }
298      });
299
300      if (addAtt.isUnset())
301         out.w("{}");
302
303      return out;
304   }
305
306   @SuppressWarnings({
307      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic collection/map serialization
308      "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts in collection/map serialization
309   })
310   private SerializerWriter serializeMap(YamlWriter out, Map m, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
311      int i = indent - 1;
312
313      var keyType = type.getKeyType();
314      var valueType = type.getValueType();
315
316      if (m.isEmpty()) {
317         out.w("{}");
318         return out;
319      }
320
321      var addAtt = Flag.create();
322      forEachEntry(m, x -> {
323         addAtt.ifSet(() -> out.yamlIndent(i)).set();
324         Object value = x.getValue();
325         Object key = generalize(x.getKey(), keyType);
326
327         ClassMeta<?> actualType = value == null ? valueType : getClassMetaForObject(value, valueType);
328         if (value != null && isComplexValue(actualType)) {
329            out.keyName(toString(key)).w(": ");
330            if (actualType.isCollectionOrArrayOrOptional()) {
331               serializeAnything(out, value, valueType, (key == null ? null : toString(key)), null, false);
332            } else {
333               out.yamlIndent(i + 1);
334               serializeAnything(out, value, valueType, (key == null ? null : toString(key)), null, true);
335            }
336         } else {
337            out.key(toString(key));
338            serializeAnything(out, value, valueType, (key == null ? null : toString(key)), null, true);
339         }
340      });
341
342      return out;
343   }
344
345   @SuppressWarnings({
346      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic collection/map serialization
347      "unchecked", // Type erasure requires unchecked casts in collection/map serialization
348   })
349   private SerializerWriter serializeCollection(YamlWriter out, Collection c, ClassMeta<?> type, boolean asField) throws SerializeException {
350      int i = indent - 1;
351
352      if (c.isEmpty()) {
353         out.w("[]");
354         return out;
355      }
356
357      var elementType = type.getElementType();
358
359      var addEntry = Flag.create();
360      forEachEntry(c, x -> {
361         if (asField && addEntry.isUnset()) {
362            out.w("- ");
363         } else {
364            out.listEntry(i);
365         }
366         addEntry.set();
367         serializeAnything(out, x, elementType, "<iterator>", null, true);
368      });
369
370      return out;
371   }
372
373}
